CIT.notes: KöSt (Körperschaftsteuer) 24% (reduced from 25% in 2023, 23% from 2024 onward per reform); minimum CIT applies; no local CIT surcharges

VAT.notes: Standard 20%; intermediate 13% (art, live animals, wine from farm, overnight stays from 2016); reduced 10% (food, books, pharmaceuticals, rent, passenger transport)

IIT.notes: 7-bracket progressive scale; 55% on income >€1M (temporary solidarity surcharge); 0% up to €12,816
